name: Four-in-One Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the shortening, sugars, eggs, and vanilla together until creamy.
2. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. Add the sifted ingredients to the creamed mixture; blend well.
4. Stir in the oats.
5. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
6. Place the balls on a greased cookie sheet about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 12 to 15 minutes.
8. Cool for about 2 minutes, then remove cookies from the cookie sheets.
